headline: Discipline over emotions: Friday is your reset day
summary: You're losing 0.25 kg/week instead of 0.63 kg/week; today fix portion control and commit to cardio to bridge that gap.
details: Stick to Huel meals today—no snacking despite Friday cravings—that's your baseline defense. Hit the rowing machine or treadmill for 45 minutes of sustained effort before your usual evening snacking window. Today matters because you gained 0.1 kg this week; a disciplined Friday reverses that and builds momentum into your weakest days.
